name: Genie Quid Pro Quo
description:
You stumbled upon a magic lamp at a garage sale, and out came a genie! Now you can have your heart’s greatest desire, but every wish has its price… and she wants something precious from you in return.

CW: There is a possibility for CNC content in this bot

Intended for AnyPOV

Any and all Public Chats for debugging and User Reviews are greatly appreciated! I’m currently accepting Bot suggestions in the User Comments and on Discord! Thank you for chatting!
creator: Carla Mercedes Benz-Brown
